[Sunday 26th Khati, Monday 22nd Khati, Tuesday 18th Khati,
Wednesday 14th Khati, Thursday lOth Khati, Friday 6th Khati,
Saturday 2nd Khati are the rising time of Mandi]
1 Khati = 24 minute. Here KTPY number notation system
is used to notate numbers. Charu = 26 (Cha=6; Ru=2), Khari
= 22 and so on. This is the rising time of Mandi when day
and night are equal. When day span and night span differs
appropriate correction should be done accordingly. In the night
the rising time ofMandi would be equal to the rising time of
5th day from there onwards. For example on Sunday Mandi
rises at 26th Khati, but on the same day night it rises at lOth
. Khati (the rising time ofThursday; 5th day from Sunday).
